TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Bradley_Beal, title = Bradley_Beal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bradley_Beal} }

S.FORM: == Bradley Beal == Bradley Beal hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 6, Bradley Beal, squliq na p'unro. Bradley Beal gocyu mqwas beh Chaminade College Preparatory pqwasan biru. kawas tay 2010, sangka' 2010 FIBA Under-17 World Championship,magan icibang. kawas tay 2011, pinwagan Gatorade National Player of the Year. hiya ga baq balay kmayal ego. Bradley Beal maki qutux mlikuy laqi,Luka lalu nya. hopa pqwasan biru nya kawas tay 2009 11 byacing 30 ryax,wal magal kragan gunro na pira qsasa ru musa mqwas hopa pqwasan biru University of Florida. kawas tay 2011,11 byacing 29 ryax ga wal tluw Southeastern Conference pitu ryax qani na piyang zqaws squilq. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Bradley Beal sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. NBA kanamuhay mimaliay a sikadademec(2018,2019) pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga pqwsan biru krahu cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Bradley Beal == Bradley Beal hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 6, Bradley Beal, squliq na p'unro. Bradley Beal gocyu mqwas beh Chaminade College Preparatory pqwasan biru. kawas tay 2010, sangka' 2010 FIBA Under-17 World Championship,magan icibang. kawas tay 2011, pinwagan Gatorade National Player of the Year. hiya ga baq balay kmayal ego. Bradley Beal maki qutux mlikuy laqi,Luka lalu nya. hopa pqwasan biru nya kawas tay 2009 11 byacing 30 ryax,wal magal kragan gunro na pira qsasa ru musa mqwas hopa pqwasan biru University of Florida. kawas tay 2011,11 byacing 29 ryax ga wal tluw Southeastern Conference pitu ryax qani na piyang zqaws squilq. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Bradley Beal sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. NBA kanamuhay mimaliay a sikadademec(2018,2019) pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga pqwsan biru krahu cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == βra*lej βeal == βra*lej βeal ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βra*lej βeal, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. βra*lej βeal ɣoʦ~ʨju mqwas~ɕ βeħ ʦ~ʨħamina*e ʦ~ʨolleɣe preparatorj pqwas~ɕan βiru. kawas~ɕ taj ****, s~ɕaŋkaʔ **** *iβa un*er-** worl* ʦ~ʨħampions~ɕħip,maɣan iʦ~ʨiβaŋ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, pinwaɣan ɣatora*e national plajer o* tħe jear. ħija ɣa βaq βalaj kmajal eɣo. βra*lej βeal maki qutux mlikuj laqi,luka lalu nja. ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru nja kawas~ɕ taj **** ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,wal maɣal kraɣan ɣunro na pira qs~ɕas~ɕa ru mus~ɕa mqwas~ɕ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru uni*ers~ɕitj o* *lori*a. kawas~ɕ taj ****,** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax ɣa wal tluw s~ɕoutħeas~ɕtern ʦ~ʨon*erenʦ~ʨe pitu rjax qani na pijaŋ zqaws~ɕ s~ɕquilq. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ rjax qnxan nqu βra*lej βeal s~ɕa s~ɕenmuŋ pɣnawɣan mariʔ. nβa kanamuħaj mimaliaj a s~ɕika*a*emeʦ~ʨ(****,****) ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
